description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. It uses AI to streamline editing, generate captions, and enhance video quality automatically.

policies.detail: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase.
24/7 support is available exclusively on the Pro plan. Basic plan users receive email support during business hours.
All plans are billed monthly. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect at the next billing cycle.
A 7-day free trial is available for the Pro plan. No credit card required to start.
